message:
feat(tui): implement batch_mark_unread + 21 batch selection tests [br-2bbt.10]

- Fix batch_mark_unread stub: now dispatches individual mark_unread actions
  (was returning Cmd::None, matching batch_acknowledge/batch_mark_read pattern)
- SelectionState: 9 new tests (toggle return value, select/deselect, retain,
  clear resets visual mode, duplicate idempotent, string keys)
- Messages batch: 5 new tests (acknowledge dispatch, mark_read dispatch,
  mark_unread dispatch, empty selection noop, unknown action)
- Timeline: 2 new tests (v/V case distinction, select-all batch copy count)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
